title: Ok. Not all devices are equal 👀

messages.author: tomf1.
messages.text: The closest repeaters are 8 and 10 miles. Are those antennas likely to be able to reach that far? (edited)
messages.content_html: The closest repeaters are 8 and 10 miles. Are those antennas likely to be able to reach that far? (edited)

messages.author: tomf1.
messages.text: I got a 5dBi Paradar whip antenna and stuck it up about 4 metres. I was able to see about 40 MeshTastic clients but unfortunately no MeshCore here. The nearest repeaters are not line of sight unfortunately.
messages.content_html: I got a 5dBi Paradar whip antenna and stuck it up about 4 metres. I was able to see about 40 MeshTastic clients but unfortunately no MeshCore here. The nearest repeaters are not line of sight unfortunately.
